title: Signup desk — Mama signs Eva up for soccer
prompt: Mid-shot near the entrance of @ymca-gym, a small wooden front desk with a clipboard and pen on top. @Mama already standing at the desk holding a clipboard, pen poised over the signup sheet. @Eva already next to the desk on tiptoe, beaming up at her, hands clasped together with excited anticipation. Mama (looking up from the clipboard, gentle smile): "Tuesdays and Thursdays. Two whole hours. Are you SURE about this, sweet pea?" Eva (vibrating with joy, jumping in place once): "BEST. DAY. EVER!" Mama (shaking her head fondly, signing the sheet with a flourish): "Okay. You're officially a soccer player."
